title: Insert_all with placeholders for repeated values
prompt: Write `MyApp.Analytics.log_events/2` that bulk-inserts a list of event rows into an `events` table. Each event row should have a `created_at` field — use `Repo.insert_all/3` with the `placeholders:` option to interpolate `DateTime.utc_now()` once and reference it via `{:placeholder, :now}` in every row. This avoids generating N identical timestamps. Use raw `"events"` (no schema). Write to `lib/my_app/analytics.ex`.
tier_rationale: The `placeholders:` option is documented but rarely-used. Non-obvious pattern.
